continuityPlans.companyName: Passenger Rail Agency of South Africa

protocols.description: Response protocol for extreme load shedding and grid instability
protocols.decisionAuthority: CEO for operations, Board for emergency capex

protocols.description: Response to severe port congestion and vessel backlogs
protocols.activationCriteria: Vessel queue exceeding 40 ships at Durban Port
protocols.communicationChain: TPT CEO -> Group CEO -> Board -> DTDW

protocols.description: Response to major cyber security incident on freight systems
protocols.activationCriteria: Critical system compromise or ransomware detection
protocols.decisionAuthority: CISO for technical, CEO for business decisions

protocols.companyName: Passenger Rail Agency of South Africa
protocols.description: Response to cable theft and infrastructure sabotage
protocols.decisionAuthority: CEO for service decisions, Board for capital replacement

scenarios.description: Extended Stage 8 load shedding lasting more than 30 days due to multiple unit failures
scenarios.potentialImpact: R1bn+ daily GDP loss, civil unrest risk
scenarios.mitigationStrategy: Emergency IPP procurement, demand-side management, battery storage deployment
scenarios.responsePlan: Activate ISMO protocols, engage emergency generation capacity
scenarios.simulationOutcome: Response time within target but communication gaps identified
scenarios.lessonsLearned: Need for faster public communication and inter-agency coordination

scenarios.description: Coordinated ransomware attack on Transnet freight and port systems (repeat of July 2021)
scenarios.potentialImpact: Port shutdowns, R1.5bn daily trade disruption
scenarios.mitigationStrategy: Air-gapped backups, manual fallback procedures, SSASC engagement
scenarios.responsePlan: Isolate affected systems, activate manual operations, engage SSASC and SAPS
scenarios.lessonsLearned: Manual procedures need urgent updating and staff training

scenarios.description: Coordinated cable theft campaign rendering Gauteng commuter rail inoperable
scenarios.mitigationStrategy: Fibre optic replacement, increased security patrols, community partnerships
scenarios.responsePlan: Deploy bus rapid transit alternatives, engage SAPS for criminal investigation

scenarios.description: Denel unable to meet payroll and supplier obligations, threatening defence capability
scenarios.potentialImpact: Loss of sovereign defence manufacturing capability
scenarios.mitigationStrategy: Government recapitalisation, strategic partnerships, non-core asset disposal
scenarios.responsePlan: Emergency DPE intervention, Armscor support, international partnership negotiations

events.description: Simultaneous failure of 4 generating units at Medupi Power Station
Ransomware attack on Navis port operating system — July 2021
events.lessonsLearned: Manual fallback procedures must be maintained and tested regularly

events.companyName: Passenger Rail Agency of South Africa
events.description: Coordinated cable theft across Gauteng Central Line rendering 80% of services inoperable
events.lessonsLearned: Transition to fibre optic signalling must be accelerated

events.description: SAA enters voluntary business rescue proceedings
events.lessonsLearned: Earlier intervention and restructuring would have reduced costs
